docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MANCUSO, LANCE AS TO DEFENDANT MILES, CHERYL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-18-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST BY PLAINTIFF TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE AT SMALL CLAIMS HEARING; FILED BY PLAINTIFF MANCUSO, LANCE

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPT., RETURNED "UNSUCCESSFUL/DEFENDANT WAS NOT FOUND". FILED BY PLAINTIFF MANCUSO, LANCE AS TO DEFENDANT MILES, CHERYL
